phase: Phase 16A — upstream structured_request propagation + alpha release hardening

selected_upstream_caller.signature: (query: str, context: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None, priority: int = 50) -> Dict[str, Any]
selected_upstream_caller.natural_input_shape: (query: str, context: Dict[str, Any], priority: int) — context is an open dict that production callers populate with flat domain fields like operation, from_unit, to_unit, value, table, key, subject, x, threshold, comparator, inputs, x_var, y_var, ...

rejected_alternatives.CompatibilityLayer.handle_query: thin pass-through with identical (query, context) shape; no admission/metrics/priority surface; legacy-shim role; less interesting for upstream propagation
rejected_alternatives.AutonomyRuntime.handle_query: explicitly forbidden by Phase 16A gate (Phase 15 already wired the runtime_hint_extractor here)
rejected_alternatives.ChatService.handle: different lane — uses Orchestrator, never reaches AutonomyRuntime.handle_query
rejected_alternatives.AutonomyService.execute_mission: mission-shaped input, not query-shaped; out of scope for low-risk family hint derivation

upstream_extractor_design.input: Mapping[str, Any] — flat domain dict from caller's normal context
upstream_extractor_design.output: structured_request dict in Phase 15 grammar OR rejected/skipped result
